title: Training Dummy
description: Adds a Training Dummy so you can test your weapons attack damage as see how many heart you would take from another player or entity.
body: # Training Dummy Training Dummy datapack for 1.21.6+ ## Summary Adds a Training Dummy so you can test your weapons attack damage as see how many heart you would take from another player or entity. ## Requirments Mod Version > No additional Requirments Datapack only Version > You do need to download the Resource Pack in order to see the model. *You can find the Resource Pack for the new version [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/training-dummy/version/1.1.3)* > *or by looking under the file section on the version you ar downloading* ## Usage To break the Training Dummy you need to crouch/sneak and then attack/hit the Training Dummy and it will break into 1 Hay Bale and 1 Target. To craft the Training Dummy you need: - 3 Sticks (stick) - 1 Target (target) - 1 Hay Bale (hay_block) Which you need to put into the following patten. ![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BflFQ6iN/images/521ce17a7555ad248c8ca3fdee3c4485afabd0d2.png) ## Other Stuff This is my first time making a datapack or doing anything majorly with just minecraft commands and the first time im actually releasing something i've made.
